productDisplayName: Baggit Women Brown Bonkers Dhamal Wallet
description: Style Note A perfect mixture of elegance and style, baggit brings to you yet another classy wallet from its unique collection of women accessories. Its exquisite colour combination and multiple pockets is a perfect blend of style and convenience. So just grab it and add a bit to your daily style. Product Details Three fold brown wallet with gold print and brown strap with a buckle on the front One main compartment with two slots separated by fabric, has six card holders Second fold has one id card holder, six card holders and one insert pocket   Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 9 cm   Width: 19 cm Depth: 1 cm
